title: EKS GitOps Auto-Remediation with PagerDuty & Observability Verification
description: Detect pod failure → PagerDuty → analyze → Git commit → ArgoCD sync → verify → resolve/escalate → email summary

extract_metadata.name: extract_metadata
extract_metadata.description: Extract pod/problem metadata from Davis problem event

create_pagerduty_incident.name: create_pagerduty_incident
create_pagerduty_incident.description: Create PagerDuty incident via REST API

analyze_failure.name: analyze_failure
analyze_failure.description: Classify failure type and pick remediation action

create_git_commit.name: create_git_commit
create_git_commit.description: Commit remediation manifest to GitOps repo (GitHub API)

wait_and_verify.name: wait_and_verify
wait_and_verify.description: Wait, then verify problem closed in Dynatrace (polls up to ~4 min)

resolve_pagerduty.name: resolve_pagerduty
resolve_pagerduty.description: Resolve incident if remediation succeeded, else add escalation note

send_email_summary.name: send_email_summary
send_email_summary.description: Email full incident + remediation summary with observability links

input.subject: {% if result('wait_and_verify').remediation_successful %}✅ RESOLVED{% else %}⚠️ ESCALATED{% endif %}: {{ result('extract_metadata').service }} — auto-remediation report

log_audit_event.name: log_audit_event
log_audit_event.description: Ingest custom audit event back into Dynatrace
